common.name: Name
settings.charHideHint: Master switch for the 'Character' effect. While off, entries with the Character effect only hide the nameplate, not the model. Experimental.
settings.chatExempt: Show chat again in party/duty (otherwise filtered)
settings.autoPruneHint: Expired entries are removed automatically (checked every 30 s).
settings.confirmBeforeAddHint: When adding via context menu or command, first open a window to review/edit the entry.
update.available: [XIVIgnore] New version v{0} available — please update.
settings.updateMessagesHint: One-time chat note after an update, and a reminder if a newer version is available.
addconfirm.title: Confirm entry
edit.title: Edit entry
edit.charHideOff: 'Hide character' is off in Settings — enable it there to use this effect.
cmd.help: XIVIgnore. No argument: window. Otherwise: add Name@World | remove Name@World | list.
cmd.addFormat: [XIVIgnore] Format: /xivignore add First Last@World  (or a target like <t>, <f>, <2>)
cmd.removeFormat: [XIVIgnore] Format: /xivignore remove First Last@World  (or a target like <t>, <f>, <2>)
import.title: Import from game blacklist
import.openHint: Open Social → Blacklist in-game; entries are read automatically.
import.trackNotice: Note: the game's blacklist takes priority — while someone is listed there, XIVIgnore's features won't apply to them (the game blocks them itself). Import them here, then remove them from the in-game blacklist so XIVIgnore (categories, notes, expiry, filters) takes over.
import.scrollHint: If entries are missing, scroll the blacklist and click Refresh.
